title: Triangle Angle
text: We have an east component (20m) and a south component (35m). The resultant points into the southeast quadrant.

title: Apply Arctan Function
text: The vector ends $$20m$$ east and $$35m$$ south of start. The compass bearing from north (clockwise) is $$180-\arctan\left(\frac{20}{35}\right)$$. What is this value?
